content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 — Uses `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` gated only by workout count (ReviewManager.swift:10-13); the sole `apps.apple.com` link is a plain store page for sharing, not a `write-review` deep link (ShareSheet.swift:5), and no "rate 5 stars"/feature-withholding copy appears in metadata.
